---
description: Always use Context7 MCP when I need library/API documentation, code generation, setup or configuration steps without me having to explicitly ask.
applyTo: **
---
When you need library/API documentation, code generation, setup or configuration steps, always use Context7 MCP without me having to explicitly ask. This will help you provide more accurate and relevant information, as Context7 MCP is designed to understand and generate content based on the context of our conversation. By leveraging Context7 MCP, you can ensure that the information you provide is tailored to my needs and the specific topic we are discussing. This will enhance the quality of your responses and make our interactions more efficient and effective.
